label: Harris, Soderlund, Hultman 1992
notes: Clinical Science 1992 83:367-374. PMID 1327657. Full paper supplied by user. Table I has per-subject day-by-day urinary retention for 20 g/d (subjects 1/2/5) and 30 g/d + single-leg exercise (subjects 13-15). Subject 5 (20 g/d no exercise) 5-day cumulative retention 13.6 g of 88 g active = 15.5% (matches Hultman group mean and Patch A Hill=2 model output). Subjects 13-15 retention substantially higher due to exercise augmentation that is not modeled. PubMed abstract HTML retained for citation metadata verification.
